name: io.github.Lyellr88/marm-mcp-server
description: Universal MCP Server with advanced AI memory capabilities and semantic search.
author: Ryan Lyell - MARM Systems

tools.name: marm_log_entry
tools.description: Log important information to MARM's memory system

tools.name: marm_context_log
tools.description: Log durable context with automatic categorization

tools.name: marm_smart_recall
tools.description: Intelligent memory recall using semantic search

tools.name: marm_summary
tools.description: Generate intelligent summaries from memory data

tools.name: marm_notebook
tools.description: Unified notebook — add, use, show, status, or clear entries (action parameter required)

tools.name: marm_log_session
tools.description: Create or switch to named session container

tools.name: marm_delete
tools.description: Delete a log session, log entry, or notebook entry (type='log'|'notebook')

tools.name: marm_compaction
tools.description: Review, stage, apply, or discard agent-assisted memory compaction candidates
